error_signature: Only works if we are not using toggle
title: Notion API block insertion fails with toggle blocks
symptom: When attempting to insert a new block using the Notion API, the operation fails if the target block is a toggle block.
applies_when: Using Notion API to insert blocks
Target block is not a toggle
not_this_if: Target block is a toggle block
root_cause: The Notion API has limitations regarding the manipulation of toggle blocks. Specifically, the method for inserting new blocks does not support toggle blocks, leading to failures when such blocks are involved.
fix_steps: Ensure the target block for insertion is not a toggle block
Use the PATCH request to insert the new block as shown in the documentation
agent_instruction: Check that the target block is not a toggle before attempting to insert a new block.
